P

processLogin(LoginForm, HttpSession, Model) - Method in class com.gcu.LoginController
Processes login form submission.
processRegister(RegisterForm, Model, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.gcu.registration.RegisterController
 
ProductEntity - Class in com.gcu.data.entity
This class is used by the data layer to map product data from the database into Java objects for use in the application.
ProductEntity() - Constructor for class com.gcu.data.entity.ProductEntity
Default constructor
ProductEntity(Long, String, String, Double, Long) - Constructor for class com.gcu.data.entity.ProductEntity
Argument constructor
ProductModel - Class in com.gcu.model
This class is used to transfer product data from the business layer to the web layer without exposing database specific details.
ProductModel() - Constructor for class com.gcu.model.ProductModel
 
ProductModel(Long, String, String, double, Long) - Constructor for class com.gcu.model.ProductModel
 
ProductsBusinessInterface - Interface in com.gcu.business
This interface represents the business layer for product management.
ProductsBusinessService - Class in com.gcu.business
This class retrieves product data from the data layer and converts ProductEntity objects into ProductModel objects for use by the presentation layer
ProductsBusinessService() - Constructor for class com.gcu.business.ProductsBusinessService
 
ProductsController - Class in com.gcu
This controller displays product pages and handles creation of new products.
ProductsController(ProductsBusinessService) - Constructor for class com.gcu.ProductsController
 
ProductsDataService - Class in com.gcu.data
This class implements the DataAccessInterface and uses Spring JDBC together with ProductsRepository to perform CRUD operations on products
ProductsDataService(ProductsRepository, DataSource) - Constructor for class com.gcu.data.ProductsDataService
 
ProductsRepository - Interface in com.gcu.data.repository
This repository extends CrudRepository and provides custom SQL queries for retrieving products from the PRODUCTS table.
